name: Cherry Dessert Wontons
recipeInstructions:
1. To assemble the wontons, place approximately 1 1/2 teaspoons of cherry pie filling (about two cherries plus sauce) in the center of each wonton wrapper.
2. Fold the edges of each wrapper over the filling to form a triangle shape.
3. Bring one corner up over the filling to the opposite corner at an angle.
4. Pull the two bottom corners of the folded triangle forward so that they meet and slightly overlap.
5. Moisten one end and pinch the two ends firmly together.
6. Repeat for all wontons.
7. Pour the oil into a deep fryer and heat to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
8. Deep fry the wontons, about 8 to 10 at a time, for about two minutes or until crisp and golden.
9. Drain on paper towels.
10. Fried wontons can be kept warm for up to one hour in a 250 degrees F (120 degrees C) oven or reheated for 5 minutes in a 450 degrees F (230 degrees C) oven.
11. Sprinkle with powdered sugar or cinnamon sugar, if desired.
